stemHtml: ATC: "SUN AIR 764, RESET SQUAWK MODE Charlie 5503". What should you do and reply?

options.b: Reset 5503, ensure altitude reporting, reply "resetting squawk 5503 mode Charlie, SUN AIR 764".
options.c: Reset 5503, ensure altitude reporting, reply "resetting mode Charlie 5503, SUN AIR 764".
